system.description:
When someone near you is going to be hurt or killed for any reason (including by you) you may roll [quality].

If you use this ability on an Agent, they can roll Professionalism, add their 3s to your roll, and decide what time frame they will return in.
system.synopsis: Protect a target by sending them away

outcomes.success: instead of being hurt the target is sent Elsewhere. Somewhere of joy, adventure, and magic. A decade from now, they will return the same age as when they left, memories intact.
outcomes.eachplus3:
you may pick from additional return time frames:
  • 1: Five years
  • 2: One Year
  • 3: One Month
  • 4: One Day
  • 5: A Few Moments Later
outcomes.triscendence: they can return at any time, and they can have  experienced as much time as you like there. Those numbers can be different.
outcomes.failure: their mind is sent there but their body is not. It will return when they do, perhaps. Or perhaps something else will make use of the body.
